title: 2 Pcs Rainbow Windmills, Plastic Pinwheel for Gardens, Outdoor Wind Spinners to Scare Birds for Courtyards, Lawns, Parties, and Balconies as Decorative
features: Vibrant Rainbow Pinwheels: These colorful plastic windmills for garden create eye-catching movement, adding playful charm to lawns, balconies and outdoor parties.
Dual Function Design: Works as both decorative garden windmill spinners and effective bird repellent windmills to gently deter birds from your plants.

Durable Outdoor Material: Made from weather-resistant plastic, these windmill poles can withstand prolonged exposure to sunlight and rain, offering waterproof, fade-resistant, and outdoor-environment-resistant properties.

Easy Installation: Simply assemble the windmill blades onto the main pole, set them with spacers and rings, then insert into the ground—installation takes just minutes, requires no tools, making setup easy and fun, with beautiful rotating effects visible in even the slightest breeze.
Multi-Functional Use: With smooth edges, these windmill toys are ideal for outdoor play or as decorative accents in gardens, lawns, patios, ponds, parties, or even farms.
description: Colour: Colorful Material: Plastic 1. Our garden windmill stands 39 centimetres tall and has a diameter of 18 centimetres, making it large enough to attract birds from a distance. Its vibrantly coloured blades add a splash of colour to your outdoor space. 2. These garden windmills are made from high-quality PVC material, offering waterproof, fade-resistant, and weather-resistant properties. The windmill pole is sturdy and stable, capable of withstanding strong winds and suitable for long-term use. 3. Designed to rotate freely in gentle breezes, the windmill is lightweight and highly responsive to even the slightest breeze. Its rotating motion not only adds dynamic beauty to your space but also provides a pleasant visual experience.
